subject: Science
chapter: Nature of Matter: Elements, Compounds, and Mixtures

activities_projects.title: Designing a Method to Separate a Mixture
activities_projects.objective: To apply knowledge of separation techniques
steps: Mix sand and salt in water
Filter the mixture to remove sand
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students apply filtration and evaporation methods

activities_projects.title: Investigating Chemical Change in Compound Formation
activities_projects.objective: To observe chemical change during compound formation
steps: Heat the mixture in a china dish
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn that compounds have new properties

activities_projects.title: Analyzing Gas Formation in Chemical Reactions
activities_projects.objective: To identify gases formed during reactions
steps: Add iron filings to a test tube
Test the gas using a burning splinter
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students identify hydrogen gas and its properties

activities_projects.title: Investigating Electrolysis of Water
activities_projects.objective: To determine the composition of water
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students confirm that water is composed of hydrogen and oxygen

activities_projects.title: Classifying Substances from a Given List
activities_projects.objective: To classify substances as elements, compounds, or mixtures
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students apply conceptual understanding of classification

activities_projects.title: Comparative Study of Alloys
activities_projects.objective: To analyze properties of alloys compared to pure metals
steps: Observe the properties of iron and steel

activities_projects.title: Analyzing the Role of Compounds in Daily Life
activities_projects.objective: To study applications of chemical compounds
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students connect chemistry concepts with real life

activities_projects.title: Investigating Mineral Composition
activities_projects.objective: To explore minerals as natural compounds
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the role of minerals in materials

activities_projects.title: Exploring Chemical Properties of Compounds
activities_projects.objective: To observe chemical reactions of compounds
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students analyze chemical and physical processes

activities_projects.title: Designing a Model of Elements, Compounds, and Mixtures
steps: Show mixture models with different particles
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students visually understand differences between elements, compounds, and mixtures
